prompt: An abstract, hyper-realistic architectural diptych. Left panel: a series of thin, razor-sharp vertical slices of light spaced perfectly evenly across a dark void. Right panel: the same space but from a first-person perspective looking down a long corridor where the gaps of darkness are stretching elastically, becoming massive and cavernous, while the thin slices of light are forced far apart. The viewer is standing in the center of an impossibly wide dark interval. No text, no people, cinematic lighting, uncanny atmosphere, 8k resolution, surrealist style.
visual_logic: A diptych contrasting theoretical frequency (even slices) with lived experience (stretched intervals). The perspective shift makes the 'long gap' feel inevitable, as the viewer occupies the most spatially dominant section of the system.
